Class PlaceAlienState

java.lang.Object
Controller.State
Controller.RealTimeBuilding.PlaceAlienState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PlaceAlienState extends State
State that manages the placement of aliens in cabins.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • playersAlienAvailability

      Map<Player,CanInsertAliens> playersAlienAvailability
      Map tracking which aliens each player can still insert

  • Constructor Details

    • PlaceAlienState

      public PlaceAlienState(Controller controller)
      Constructor that determines which players can insert aliens. Checks for appropriate life support modules through CondensedShip class.
      Parameters:
      controller - The game controller

  • Method Details

    • fillCabinsWithHumans

      private void fillCabinsWithHumans(CondensedShip condensedShip)
      Fills all empty cabins with human crew.
      Parameters:
      condensedShip - The condensed ship to fill

    • allPlayersHavePlacedAliens

      public boolean allPlayersHavePlacedAliens()
      Checks if all players have placed their aliens.
      Returns:
      true if all players have placed their aliens, false otherwise

    • placeCrew

      public void placeCrew(String name, Coordinates coordinates, CrewType type) throws InvalidCommand, InvalidParameters
      Places an alien in a specific cabin. The cabin must have appropriate life support modules.
      Overrides:
      placeCrew in class State
      Parameters:
      name - Player's name
      coordinates - Cabin coordinates
      type - Type of alien to insert
      Throws:
      InvalidCommand - If player has already placed that alien type or cabin cannot contain it
      InvalidParameters - If coordinates don't correspond to a valid cabin

    • getAvailableCommands

      public List<String> getAvailableCommands()
      Returns a list of available commands for this state. In this case, the only commands are "PlaceHuman", "PlaceBrownAlien", and "PlacePurpleAlien".
      Specified by:
      getAvailableCommands in class State
      Returns:
      List of available commands
